title: Flipkart Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Flipkart Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Flipkart Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Flipkart Logistics:
Flipkart Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Logistics!
